deferential.ex: He treat her with a deferential air.

deferred.def: 延期的、緩期的的人的人 (或物) (延)
deferred.ex: They agreed on a deferred payment.

defiance.def: 挑釁、挑戰、無視人物 (單數) (挑)
defiance.ex: He did it in defiance of my local order.

defiant.ex: The_child had a very defiant mood.

defiantly.ex: He stood defiantly against them all.

deficiency.def: 缺乏、不足、缺點人物 (單數) (缺)

deficient.def: 缺乏的、有缺陷的人的人物 (單數) (缺)
deficient.ex: Diet was deficient in fresh fruit.

deficit.def: 赤字、虧損、不足額人物 (單數) (赤)
deficit.col: budget deficit, trade deficit, in deficit
deficit.ex: The_country has a big budget deficit.

defied.def: 違抗、不服從的人的人 (或物) (抗)
defied.ex: His escape defied all local logic.

defier.def: 挑戰者、無視者人物 (單數) (挑戰)
defier.ex: He was a bold defier of the_law.

defilade.def: (軍)縱深防護的人物、阻隔視線的人的人人物 (單數) (防)

defile.def: 弄髒、玷汙、小道的人的人人物 (單數) (髒/道)
defile.ex: They began to defile the_sacred site.

definable.def: 可下定義的、確定的的人的人物 (單數) (定)

define.def: 下定義、解釋、限定的人的人
define.ex: We need to clearly define your role.

defined.def: 確定的、清晰的人的人 (或物) (清)

definite.def: 明確的、肯定的的人的人物 (單數) (明)
definite.ex: Please give me a definite answer soon.

definition.def: 定義、清晰度、限定人物 (單數) (定)
definition.col: by definition, high definition (HD), precise definition
definition.ex: It's a job by definition for him.

definitive.def: 最後的、確定的、限定的人的人物 (單數) (終)
definitive.ex: We have no definitive proof of it.

deflagrate.def: 爆燃、急劇燃燒的人的人

deflate.def: 放氣、緊縮、使洩氣的人的人

deflation.def: 通貨緊縮、放氣人物 (單數) (縮)
deflation.ex: We are heading for economic deflation.

deflect.def: 使偏斜、使歪斜的人的人
deflect.ex: Try to deflect attention from error.

deflection.ex: There was a slight deflection of beam.

defloration.def: 採花、奪去貞操人物 (單數) (採)

deflower.def: 採花、奪取處女膜的人的人
deflower.ex: He tried to deflower the_young girl.

deforest.def: 濫砍濫伐、清林的人的人

deforestation.def: 濫砍濫伐、森林砍伐人物 (單數) (林)

deform.def: 使變形、使畸形的人的人
deform.ex: Heat will help to deform the_metal.

deformed.def: 畸形的、醜陋的人的人 (或物) (畸)
deformed.ex: The_baby was born with a deformed toe.

defraud.ex: He tried to defraud the_local bank.

defray.def: 支付、負擔(費用)的人的人
defray.ex: I will defray all your travel costs.

defrayment.ex: A full defrayment was promised now.

defrock.def: 解除僧職、褫奪官職的人的人

defrost.ex: You need to defrost the_meat first.

deft.ex: She has a very deft touch on piano.
